# services.outline

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.outline`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.outline.azureAuthentication` | `null or (submodule)` | To configure Microsoft/Azure auth, you'll need to create an OAuth Client. See [the guide](https://wiki.generaloutline.com/share/dfa77e56-d4d2-4b51-8ff8-84ea6608faa4) for details on setting up your Azure App. |
| `services.outline.azureAuthentication.clientId` | `string` | Authentication client identifier. |
| `services.outline.azureAuthentication.clientSecretFile` | `string` | File path containing the authentication secret. |
| `services.outline.azureAuthentication.resourceAppId` | `string` | Authentication application resource ID. |
| `services.outline.cdnUrl` | `string` | If using a Cloudfront/Cloudflare distribution or similar it can be set using this option. This will cause paths to JavaScript files, stylesheets and images to be updated to the hostname defined here. In your CDN configuration the origin server should be set to public URL. |
| `services.outline.concurrency` | `signed integer` | How many processes should be spawned. For a rough estimate, divide your server's available memory by 512. |
| `services.outline.databaseUrl` | `string` | URI to use for the main PostgreSQL database. If this needs to include credentials that shouldn't be world-readable in the Nix store, set an environment file on the systemd service and override the `DATABASE_URL` entry. Pass the string `local` to setup a database on the local server. |
| `services.outline.debugOutput` | `null or value "http" (singular enum)` | Set this to `http` log HTTP requests. |
| `services.outline.defaultLanguage` | `one of "da_DK", "de_DE", "en_US", "es_ES", "fa_IR", "fr_FR", "it_IT", "ja_JP", "ko_KR", "nl_NL", "pl_PL", "pt_BR", "pt_PT", "ru_RU", "sv_SE", "th_TH", "vi_VN", "zh_CN", "zh_TW"` | The default interface language. See [translate.getoutline.com](https://translate.getoutline.com/) for a list of available language codes and their rough percentage translated. |
| `services.outline.discordAuthentication` | `null or (submodule)` | To configure Discord auth, you'll need to create an application at <https://discord.com/developers/applications/> See <https://docs.getoutline.com/s/hosting/doc/discord-g4JdWFFub6> for details on setting up your Discord app. |
| `services.outline.discordAuthentication.clientId` | `string` | Authentication client identifier. |
| `services.outline.discordAuthentication.clientSecretFile` | `string` | File path containing the authentication secret. |
| `services.outline.discordAuthentication.serverId` | `string` | Restrict logins to a specific server (optional, but recommended). You can find a Discord server's ID by right-clicking the server icon, and select “Copy Server ID”. |
| `services.outline.discordAuthentication.serverRoles` | `strings concatenated with ","` | Optionally restrict logins to a comma-separated list of role IDs |
| `services.outline.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable outline. |
| `services.outline.enableUpdateCheck` | `boolean` | Have the installation check for updates by sending anonymized statistics to the maintainers. |
| `services.outline.forceHttps` | `boolean` | Auto-redirect to HTTPS in production. The default is `true` but you may set this to `false` if you can be sure that SSL is terminated at an external loadbalancer. |
| `services.outline.googleAnalyticsId` | `null or string` | Optionally enable Google Analytics to track page views in the knowledge base. |
| `services.outline.googleAuthentication` | `null or (submodule)` | To configure Google auth, you'll need to create an OAuth Client ID at <https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials> When configuring the Client ID, add an Authorized redirect URI to `https://[publicUrl]/auth/google.callback`. |
| `services.outline.googleAuthentication.clientId` | `string` | Authentication client identifier. |
| `services.outline.googleAuthentication.clientSecretFile` | `string` | File path containing the authentication secret. |
| `services.outline.group` | `string` | Group under which the service should run. If this is the default value, the group will be created. |
| `services.outline.logo` | `null or string` | Custom logo displayed on the authentication screen. This will be scaled to a height of 60px. |
| `services.outline.maximumImportSize` | `signed integer` | The maximum size of document imports. Overriding this could be required if you have especially large Word documents with embedded imagery. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication` | `null or (submodule)` | To configure generic OIDC auth, you'll need some kind of identity provider. See the documentation for whichever IdP you use to fill out all the fields. The redirect URL is `https://[publicUrl]/auth/oidc.callback`. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.authUrl` | `string` | OIDC authentication URL endpoint. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.clientId` | `string` | Authentication client identifier. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.clientSecretFile` | `string` | File path containing the authentication secret. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.displayName` | `string` | Display name for OIDC authentication. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.scopes` | `list of string` | OpenID authentication scopes. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.tokenUrl` | `string` | OIDC token URL endpoint. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.userinfoUrl` | `string` | OIDC userinfo URL endpoint. |
| `services.outline.oidcAuthentication.usernameClaim` | `string` | Specify which claims to derive user information from. Supports any valid JSON path with the JWT payload |
| `services.outline.package` | `package` | Outline package to use. |
| `services.outline.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Listening port. |
| `services.outline.publicUrl` | `string` | The fully qualified, publicly accessible URL |
| `services.outline.rateLimiter.durationWindow` | `signed integer` | Length of a throttling window. |
| `services.outline.rateLimiter.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable rate limiter for the application web server. |
| `services.outline.rateLimiter.requests` | `signed integer` | Maximum number of requests in a throttling window. |
| `services.outline.redisUrl` | `string` | Connection to a redis server. If this needs to include credentials that shouldn't be world-readable in the Nix store, set an environment file on the systemd service and override the `REDIS_URL` entry. Pass the string `local` to setup a local Redis database. |
| `services.outline.secretKeyFile` | `string` | File path that contains the application secret key. It must be 32 bytes long and hex-encoded. If the file does not exist, a new key will be generated and saved here. |
| `services.outline.sentryDsn` | `null or string` | Optionally enable [Sentry](https://sentry.io/) to track errors and performance. |
| `services.outline.sentryTunnel` | `null or string` | Optionally add a [Sentry proxy tunnel](https://docs.sentry.io/platforms/javascript/troubleshooting/#using-the-tunnel-option) for bypassing ad blockers in the UI. |
| `services.outline.slackAuthentication` | `null or (submodule)` | To configure Slack auth, you'll need to create an Application at <https://api.slack.com/apps> When configuring the Client ID, add a redirect URL under "OAuth & Permissions" to `https://[publicUrl]/auth/slack.callback`. |
| `services.outline.slackAuthentication.clientId` | `string` | Authentication key. |
| `services.outline.slackAuthentication.secretFile` | `string` | File path containing the authentication secret. |
| `services.outline.slackIntegration` | `null or (submodule)` | For a complete Slack integration with search and posting to channels this configuration is also needed. See here for details: <https://wiki.generaloutline.com/share/be25efd1-b3ef-4450-b8e5-c4a4fc11e02a> |
| `services.outline.slackIntegration.appId` | `string` | Application ID. |
| `services.outline.slackIntegration.messageActions` | `boolean` | Whether to enable message actions. |
| `services.outline.slackIntegration.verificationTokenFile` | `string` | File path containing the verification token. |
| `services.outline.smtp` | `null or (submodule)` | To support sending outgoing transactional emails such as "document updated" or "you've been invited" you'll need to provide authentication for an SMTP server. |
| `services.outline.smtp.fromEmail` | `string` | Sender email in outgoing mail. |
| `services.outline.smtp.host` | `string` | Host name or IP address of the SMTP server. |
| `services.outline.smtp.passwordFile` | `string` | File path containing the password to authenticate with. |
| `services.outline.smtp.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | TCP port of the SMTP server. |
| `services.outline.smtp.replyEmail` | `string` | Reply address in outgoing mail. |
| `services.outline.smtp.secure` | `boolean` | Use a secure SMTP connection. |
| `services.outline.smtp.tlsCiphers` | `string` | Override SMTP cipher configuration. |
| `services.outline.smtp.username` | `string` | Username to authenticate with. |
| `services.outline.sslCertFile` | `null or string` | File path that contains the Base64-encoded certificate for HTTPS termination. This is only required if you do not use an external reverse proxy. See [the documentation](https://wiki.generaloutline.com/share/dfa77e56-d4d2-4b51-8ff8-84ea6608faa4). |
| `services.outline.sslKeyFile` | `null or string` | File path that contains the Base64-encoded private key for HTTPS termination. This is only required if you do not use an external reverse proxy. See [the documentation](https://wiki.generaloutline.com/share/dfa77e56-d4d2-4b51-8ff8-84ea6608faa4). |
| `services.outline.storage` | `submodule` | To support uploading of images for avatars and document attachments an s3-compatible storage can be provided. AWS S3 is recommended for redundancy however if you want to keep all file storage local an alternative such as [garage](https://garagehq.deuxfleurs.fr/) can be used. Local filesystem storage can also be used. A more detailed guide on setting up storage is available [here](https://docs.getoutline.com/s/hosting/doc/file-storage-N4M0T6Ypu7). |
| `services.outline.storage.accelerateUrl` | `null or string` | URL for AWS S3 [transfer acceleration](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/transfer-acceleration.html). |
| `services.outline.storage.accessKey` | `string` | S3 access key. |
| `services.outline.storage.acl` | `string` | ACL setting. |
| `services.outline.storage.forcePathStyle` | `boolean` | Force S3 path style. |
| `services.outline.storage.localRootDir` | `string` | If `storageType` is `local`, this sets the parent directory under which all attachments/images go. |
| `services.outline.storage.region` | `string` | AWS S3 region name. |
| `services.outline.storage.secretKeyFile` | `absolute path` | File path that contains the S3 secret key. |
| `services.outline.storage.storageType` | `one of "local", "s3"` | File storage type, it can be local or s3. |
| `services.outline.storage.uploadBucketName` | `string` | Name of the bucket where uploads should be stored. |
| `services.outline.storage.uploadBucketUrl` | `string` | URL endpoint of an S3-compatible API where uploads should be stored. |
| `services.outline.storage.uploadMaxSize` | `signed integer` | Maxmium file size for uploads. |
| `services.outline.user` | `string` | User under which the service should run. If this is the default value, the user will be created, with the specified group as the primary group. |
| `services.outline.utilsSecretFile` | `string` | File path that contains the utility secret key. If the file does not exist, a new key will be generated and saved here. |
